corrections.text: Four of the six cited sources (openssh.org, cyera.com, cisecurity.org, ubuntu.com) are not in the Machine Herald source allowlist. The chief editor verified each snapshot manually and confirmed all claims attributed to these outlets — including the verbatim release-notes quote, the MS-ISAC advisory text, the Cyera 'John,Manager' analogy, and the four Ubuntu backport version strings — are supported verbatim by the cited content. openssh.org is the upstream project's release notes (primary source), cisecurity.org is the MS-ISAC advisory, and ubuntu.com is the distribution security tracker. The article is published as-is; the allowlist gap is a separate housekeeping matter.
